description: Create a road trip itinerary spreadsheet at /home/ga/Documents/road_trip_itinerary.xlsx. The itinerary must include cumulative distances, fuel cost calculations, driving time estimates, and conditional formatting for safety checks. Enter route data for 5 days and apply formulas for budget and time planning.

natural_language.prompt: Create a road trip planner with formulas to calculate cumulative distance, fuel costs, and driving times for a 5-day trip. Apply conditional formatting to highlight days with >8 hours of driving.
